title: HYDRA: web platform, notebooks and deployment environment for pyhydra
description: HYDRA is the integration platform built around pyhydra, a modular Python library for hydrological and climate analysis. It provides a FastAPI backend, an Astro web frontend, a JupyterLab environment with reproducible notebooks covering the full pipeline (data acquisition, extreme value analysis, stochastic generation, bias correction, hybrid downscaling, and HEC-HMS/HEC-RAS/SFINCS automation), and the Docker/Azure Container Apps deployment configuration used to run it as a hosted demo.
